next_steps: Surgical biopsy of the pericardial tissue or retroperitoneal soft-tissue mass
Serum IgG4 levels and serum protein electrophoresis with immunofixation
Measurement of serum and urine osmolarity to evaluate diabetes insipidus
Histopathological examination with immunohistochemical staining (IgG4, IgG, CD68, CD1a)
Start pulse-dose glucocorticoids for symptomatic management
Consultation with rheumatology and cardiothoracic surgery
